reputation.title: Reputation = Trust & Growth
reputation.body: Oxy Trust is a reputation system that reacts to what you do. Helpful, respectful, constructive actions earn it. Harmful or low‑effort stuff chips it away. More reputation can unlock benefits; low reputation can limit features. It keeps things fair and rewards real contribution.

ready.title: You're Ready
ready.body: Explore. Contribute. Earn reputation. Stay in control.

trust.title: Oxy Trust = Trust & Growth
trust.body: Oxy Trust is a reputation system that reacts to what you do. Helpful, respectful, constructive actions earn reputation. Harmful or low‑effort stuff chips it away. More reputation raises your trust tier and can unlock benefits; low reputation can limit features. It keeps things fair and rewards real contribution.

what.a: Reputation is a recognition of your positive actions in the Oxy Ecosystem. It cannot be sent or received directly.

earn.a: By helping others, reporting bugs, contributing content, and participating in community events.

lose.a: Reputation may be reduced for negative actions or breaking community rules.

use.q: What can I do with reputation?
use.a: Unlock rewards, badges, and special features as you earn more reputation.

transfer.q: Can I transfer reputation to others?
transfer.a: No, reputation cannot be sent or received. It is only earned by your actions.

support.a: Contact Oxy support via the app or website for any reputation-related questions.

learnMoreUsernames.introText: Your username is how people find and recognize you across all Oxy apps.

what.title: What is a username?
what.content: Your username is your unique identifier on Oxy. It's how other people find and mention you. Think of it like your handle on social media - it's public and represents your identity across all Oxy apps.

rules.title: Username rules
rules.content: Usernames can only contain lowercase letters (a-z) and numbers (0-9). They must be at least 4 characters long. Special characters, spaces, and uppercase letters are not allowed to keep usernames simple and easy to remember.

unique.title: Why must it be unique?
unique.content: Each username can only belong to one person. This ensures that when someone searches for you or mentions you, they find the right person. It also prevents confusion and impersonation.

change.title: Can I change it later?
change.content: Yes! You can change your username anytime in your account settings. Keep in mind that your old username will become available for others to use, and people who knew your old username will need to find you with the new one.

tips.title: Tips for choosing a username
tips.content: Choose something memorable and easy to spell. Avoid using personal information like your birth year or phone number. Consider using a name that represents you across all contexts - professional and personal.

learnMoreUsernames.footer: Need more help? Visit our Help Center for additional information.

center.title: Trust Center
center.info: Reputation can only be earned by positive actions in the Oxy Ecosystem. It cannot be sent or received directly.

about.title: About Oxy Trust
about.subtitle: Learn about the reputation system
about.intro: Oxy Trust is a recognition of your positive actions in the Oxy Ecosystem. Reputation cannot be sent or received directly, only earned by contributing to the community.

why.title: Why Oxy Trust?
why.text: Your reputation and trust tier unlock special features and recognition in the Oxy Ecosystem. The more you contribute, the more you earn!

faq.title: Trust FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about Oxy Trust

what.a: Oxy Trust is a reputation system that recognizes your positive contributions across the Oxy Ecosystem. Your reputation reflects how helpful, respectful, and constructive your actions are.

earn.a: You earn reputation by contributing content, helping other users, participating in events, and reporting bugs. Constructive, positive actions raise your reputation over time.

lose.a: Yes. Harmful, abusive, or low-effort actions can reduce your reputation and lower your trust tier.

use.a: Your reputation and trust tier unlock special features, recognition, and privileges across the Oxy Ecosystem.

transfer.q: Can I send or receive reputation?
transfer.a: No. Reputation cannot be transferred between accounts. It can only be earned through your own actions.

support.a: If you have questions about Oxy Trust, read the About section or contact support from the Help screen.

leaderboard.title: Trust Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top contributors in the community
leaderboard.emptyDesc: Top contributors will appear here as the community grows.
